name: @uriva/p2b-scheduling
description: Create, query, and manage calendar events and meeting availability across Calendly, Google Calendar, and Microsoft 365 Calendar (Outlook) using safescript. Covers event creation, searching events, free/busy availability, and booking. Triggers: calendar, event, meeting, schedule, scheduling, availability, free busy, booking, appointment, reminder, timezone, create event, Google Calendar, Outlook, Microsoft 365, Calendly.
